title: Lightning Channel Jamming
description: A denial-of-service pattern where HTLC slots or liquidity are intentionally exhausted on routing paths.

resources.title: BOLT 02: Peer Protocol
resources.notes: HTLC update and commitment behavior exploited by jamming strategies.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core Academy: Pinning Attacks
resources.notes: Related fee/pinning mechanics that affect channel closure safety.
